Siam Kitchen

Book a Table Order Takeaway
Our Story

Born by the Mekong

The idea for Thann THAI was born on the banks of the Mekong river overlooking the mountain peaks of Laos at sunset with Vietnam in the far distance. Good quality Thai food using local produce was an inherent part of growing up.

Now joined by professional chefs from around Thailand, we are proud to share with you our traditional dishes lovingly prepared with the freshest ingredients — every plate carrying the memory of that river, those peaks, and the warmth of home.

A Taste of Siam
